title: Doorkeeper Origin
description:
All current versions of Doorkeeper origin
The DOOR won't open to you in peaceful mod!

If you like my project, and you want to support me for more content you can go in the links bellow.
body:
Doorkeeper

Icon: Dark Oak Door

Description: Golem-village created to be a home for entire villager nation

Impact: 🔴 🔴 🔴

-Abilities-
❤️ Home in heart: You can create a dimensional Door(literally) that can teleport anybody in your village dimension, to do so player need to knock the door three times by hitting it. Village dimension is a huge mesa-like badlands with a big walls protecting villagers living in city at the bottom. There's no hostile mobs, in big walls you can find some basic ores, and there's a lot of villages. (Press Primary while sneaking)
🤝 Pick Up: Send other entities to your village dimension (When standing press Primary)
🌟  Iron Star: You can summon your golem-stand(yep) from your pocket village by pressing secondary key. It`s constantly drain your stamina while active, high index of stamina can cause many debuffs, to reduce stamina meter you can eat emeralds, or just teleport to your pocket village. (Press Secondary to summon, while sneaking to unsummon)
🦾Stand Block: Crouch to defend yourself from incoming projectiles.

-Properties-
Haste: Sweet-sweet villages filling you up with courage, you mine faster at home, and loses all debuffs.

-Debuffs-
Home-sitter: Less health, heavy armor cause slowness, need more food, and take more damage from the overworld mobs.

This origin is made for people that likes to build things in Minecraft, the pocket dimension is very beautiful place to display your works, and your companion Iron Star is great help in expeditions on the surface for rare materials.

If you like my project, and you want to support me for more content you can go in the links bellow.
